title: 1. Core Rules
intro: These rules apply to everyone, at all times.

items.title: 1.1 Respect Everyone
items.body: Treat all players and staff with respect. Harassment, discrimination, and hate speech are never acceptable.

items.title: 1.2 No RDM / VDM
items.body: Random deathmatch and vehicle deathmatch are forbidden. Violence must have clear in-character context and escalation.

items.title: 1.3 No Fail RP
items.body: Play your actions and surroundings seriously. Do not ignore injuries, scene pressure, or obvious consequences for convenience.

items.title: 1.4 No Meta Gaming
items.body: Keep out-of-character information out of your in-character decisions unless the server explicitly provides it in-character.

items.title: 1.5 No Power Gaming
items.body: Do not force outcomes on other players or use unrealistic actions to remove their agency in a scene.

title: 2. In-Character Rules
intro: Rules that govern your character and how you roleplay them.

items.title: 2.1 Act Your Age
items.body: Your in-game character must act their age and maturity level. Do not use childish or troll behaviour on serious characters.

items.title: 2.2 Value Your Life
items.body: Your character should fear pain, arrest, injury, and death. Reckless heroics without reason undermine scene quality.

items.title: 2.3 Keep Character Consistent
items.body: Build believable motives, routines, and relationships. Sudden personality changes for advantage should be avoided.

title: 3. Combat & Weapon Rules
intro: Standards for escalation, violence, and high-risk scenes.

items.title: 3.1 Escalate Properly
items.body: Give scenes room to develop. Threats, confrontation, and violence should follow believable in-character escalation.

items.title: 3.2 Use Fear Realistically
items.body: Weapons change the tone of a scene. Treat them seriously and roleplay the pressure they create.

items.title: 3.3 No Convenience Respawns
items.body: Do not use death or scene resets to escape consequences, police process, or medical follow-up.

title: 4. Vehicle Rules
intro: Driving should feel grounded, not arcade-like.

items.title: 4.1 Drive Believably
items.body: Avoid impossible speeds, unrealistic stunts, and constant reckless driving unless the scene clearly calls for it.

items.title: 4.2 Respect Collisions
items.body: Major crashes should be roleplayed properly. Stop, assess injuries, and let emergency services become part of the story.

items.title: 4.3 No Vehicle Abuse
items.body: Do not weaponise vehicles, ram without strong RP reason, or use vehicles to bully scenes for easy wins.

title: 5. Economy Rules
intro: A healthy server economy depends on restraint and fairness.

items.title: 5.1 Earn Through RP
items.body: Use jobs, services, and business interactions as part of your story rather than treating the economy like a grind-only system.

items.title: 5.2 No Exploits
items.body: Duping, bug abuse, AFK farming, and loophole exploitation will be treated as serious rule breaks.

items.title: 5.3 Respect Ownership
items.body: Businesses, vehicles, and property should be handled with in-character logic and proper permission.

title: 6. Staff & Support
intro: How to work with staff and support systems fairly.

items.title: 6.1 Follow Staff Directions
items.body: If staff intervene, pause the scene when asked and follow instructions calmly while the issue is resolved.

items.title: 6.2 Use Tickets Properly
items.body: Report issues through the correct support routes with evidence, patience, and clear timelines.

items.title: 6.3 No Public Drama
items.body: Do not turn disputes into public arguments. Let staff handle them through the proper channels.

title: 7. Server & Community
intro: Standards that help the wider community stay strong.

items.title: 7.1 Protect the Atmosphere
items.body: Keep comms, text chat, and scene behaviour in line with the serious server tone wherever possible.

items.title: 7.2 Support New Players
items.body: Help new arrivals settle into the city without stripping them of the chance to learn in character.

items.title: 7.3 Build With Intention
items.body: Whether you join a department or work a civilian job, contribute to the server in a way that gives others scenes too.
